description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The front features a raised entryway accessed by a staircase, flanked by a small garden with palm-like plants and a driveway leading to a garage. The exterior walls are light gray with large windows, and the roof is covered in green, possibly simulating a green roof or turf. A rolled-up beige structure, possibly representing a driveway cover or awning, extends along one side of the house. The property includes a driveway, a detached green lawn area, and a paved walkway, all set within a minimal urban lot. The overall design is sleek and functional, with an emphasis on geometric lines and open space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a raised entry, garage, and green roof, surrounded by a driveway, lawn, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, garage, driveway, and garden with palm plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, side windows, and the rolled-up beige structure extending along the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat green roof, back entrance, and the continuation of the rolled-up structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the beige rolled-up structure and the side windows, with minimal landscaping visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
